metadata.title: KEV-Remediate - Automated KEV Remediation via WUfB + Intune
metadata.description: Sentinel playbook (incident-triggered). Automates remediation of CISA KEVs via WUfB expedited deployment (Windows KBs) or Intune on-demand remediation (third-party).
prerequisites: Grant the Logic App MI: Microsoft Sentinel Responder on the workspace
Grant the Logic App MI: WindowsUpdates.ReadWrite.All (Graph API)
Grant the Logic App MI: Device.Read.All (Graph API)
Grant the Logic App MI: DeviceManagementManagedDevices.Read.All (Graph API)
Grant the Logic App MI: DeviceManagementManagedDevices.PrivilegedOperations.All (Graph API)
Grant the Logic App MI: DeviceManagementScripts.ReadWrite.All (Graph API)
Grant the Logic App MI: Mail.Send (Graph API)
Assign Entra role: Windows Update Deployment Administrator to the Logic App MI

metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace with Sentinel enabled.
Customer ID (GUID) of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.message:
@{concat('**KEV-Remediate Playbook Action**

', if(greater(length(string(coalesce(outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['kbId'], ''))), 0), concat('**Path:** WUfB Expedited Deployment
**KB:** ', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['kbId'], '
**Devices:** ', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['deviceCount'], '
**Status:** Expedited deployment created.'), concat('**Path:** Third-Party Approval-Gated Remediation
**CVE:** ', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['cveId'], '
**Software:** ', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['softwareName'], '
**Devices:** ', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['deviceCount'], '
**Pilot (auto):** ', string(length(variables('PilotDevices'))), '
**Broad (pending):** ', string(length(variables('BroadDevices'))), '
**MECM (notified):** ', string(length(variables('MecmDevices'))), '
**Unmanaged:** ', string(length(variables('UnmanagedDevices'))), '
**Status:** Pilot devices submitted for Intune remediation.')))}

@{concat('**KEV remediation verified**

**CVE:** ', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['cveId'], '
**KB:** ', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['kb'], '
**Deployment ID:** ', outputs('Get_Deployment_Id'), '
**Targeted devices:** ', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['deviceCount'], '
**Verification:** MDETVM_CL no longer reports the CVE for the targeted devices.
**Verified at:** ', variables('LastVerificationTime'))}

properties.classificationComment: @{concat('Automatically closed by KEV-Remediate after MDETVM_CL confirmed ', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['cveId'], ' no longer affects the targeted devices. Deployment ID: ', outputs('Get_Deployment_Id'))}
properties.title: @{outputs('Extract_CVE_and_KB_from_Title')?['title']}

body.content:
@{concat('

KEV remediation verified

CVE', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['cveId'], '
KB', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['kb'], '
Deployment ID', outputs('Get_Deployment_Id'), '
Targeted Devices', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['deviceCount'], '
Remaining Devices0
Verified At', variables('LastVerificationTime'), '

MDETVM_CL no longer reports this CVE for the targeted devices.

')}

properties.message:
@{concat('**KEV remediation not verified before timeout**

**CVE:** ', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['cveId'], '
**KB:** ', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['kb'], '
**Deployment ID:** ', outputs('Get_Deployment_Id'), '
**Remaining device count:** ', variables('RemainingDeviceCount'), '
**Remaining devices:** ', join(variables('RemainingDevices'), ', '), '
**Last TVM seen:** ', variables('LastVerificationTime'), '

The expedited deployment remains active. Devices that were offline or blocked from Windows Update should receive the update when they reconnect and scan.')}

body.content:
@{concat('

KEV remediation not verified before timeout

CVE', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['cveId'], '
KB', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['kb'], '
Deployment ID', outputs('Get_Deployment_Id'), '
Remaining Device Count', variables('RemainingDeviceCount'), '
Remaining Devices', join(variables('RemainingDevices'), ', '), '
Last TVM Seen', variables('LastVerificationTime'), '

The expedited deployment remains active. This is an exception path, not a manual monitoring requirement.

')}

inputs.status: Deployment created  devices enrolled and added to audience

body.query: @{concat('let targetDevices = dynamic(', string(outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['devices']), '); let latestDeviceTvm = MDETVM_CL | where set_has_element(targetDevices, deviceName) | summarize LatestTime = max(TimeGenerated) by deviceName; MDETVM_CL | join kind=inner latestDeviceTvm on deviceName | where TimeGenerated == LatestTime | where cveId == "', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['cveId'], '" | summarize RemainingDeviceCount = dcount(deviceName), RemainingDevices = make_set(deviceName, 10000), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)')}

value.reason: Agent type not supported for automated remediation

body.description: Updates mapped third-party CISA KEV packages with WinGet.

attachments.content: {"type":"AdaptiveCard","version":"1.4","body":[{"type":"TextBlock","text":"CISA KEV Third-Party Remediation","size":"large","weight":"bolder","color":"attention"},{"type":"FactSet","facts":[{"title":"CVE","value":"@{outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['cveId']}"},{"title":"Software","value":"@{outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['softwareName']}"},{"title":"Total Devices","value":"@{outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['deviceCount']}"},{"title":"Pilot (Intune)","value":"@{length(variables('PilotDevices'))}"},{"title":"Broad (Intune)","value":"@{length(variables('BroadDevices'))}"},{"title":"MECM-managed","value":"@{length(variables('MecmDevices'))}"},{"title":"Unmanaged","value":"@{length(variables('UnmanagedDevices'))}"},{"title":"Incident #","value":"@{outputs('Extract_CVE_and_KB_from_Title')?['incidentNumber']}"}]},{"type":"TextBlock","text":"Pilot devices will be submitted for Intune on-demand remediation. MECM and broad devices require separate action.","wrap":true,"size":"small","color":"light"}]}

inputs.status: Pilot remediation submitted. Broad and MECM devices require separate action.

body.query: @{concat('let targetCve = "', split(split(outputs('Extract_CVE_and_KB_from_Title')?['title'], ': ')[1], ' on ')[0], '"; let latestDeviceTvm = MDETVM_CL | summarize LatestTime = max(TimeGenerated) by deviceName; MDETVM_CL | join kind=inner latestDeviceTvm on deviceName | where TimeGenerated == LatestTime | where cveId == targetCve | summarize DeviceCount = dcount(deviceName), Devices = make_set(deviceName, 10000), KB = take_any(recommendedSecurityUpdate), KBId = take_any(recommendedSecurityUpdateId) by cveId | take 1')}

body.content:
@{concat('

CISA KEV Remediation Action Taken

CVE', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['cveId'], '
KB', if(greater(length(string(coalesce(outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['kbId'], ''))), 0), outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['kbId'], 'None (third-party)'), '
Affected Devices', outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['deviceCount'], '
Action', if(greater(length(string(coalesce(outputs('Parse_Query_Results')?['kbId'], ''))), 0), 'WUfB Expedited Deployment (automated)', concat('Third-Party Approval-Gated Remediation | Pilot: ', string(length(variables('PilotDevices'))), ' | Broad: ', string(length(variables('BroadDevices'))), ' | MECM: ', string(length(variables('MecmDevices'))))), '
Incident #', outputs('Extract_CVE_and_KB_from_Title')?['incidentNumber'], '

Sent by KEV-Remediate playbook

')}
